message:
fix(core,widgets,layout,tty): mouse reliability, scrollbar drag, text wrap, and pane margin/padding

This commit addresses multiple interconnected bugs and enhancements across
the core library crates that improve mouse input handling, widget behavior,
and layout precision.

**ftui-core/input_parser.rs — X10 mouse protocol and timeout handling:**
- Add `ParserState::MouseX10` variant to parse legacy X10 mouse encoding
  (ESC [ M <cb> <cx> <cy>), which some terminal emulators still emit.
- Add `InputParser::timeout()` method so bare ESC key presses are emitted
  after a read timeout instead of being swallowed as incomplete sequences.
  Incomplete UTF-8 sequences at timeout now emit the Unicode replacement
  character rather than silently dropping input.
- Fix `process_csi_ignore` to re-process invalid characters in Ground state
  instead of silently discarding them, preventing lost keystrokes after
  malformed CSI sequences.
- Fix `process_osc_string` to re-process control characters in Ground state
  instead of discarding them, preventing swallowed input after truncated
  OSC strings.

**ftui-core/terminal_session.rs — mouse escape sequence reliability:**
- Replace `crossterm::execute!(EnableMouseCapture)` / `DisableMouseCapture`
  with direct ANSI escape writes (`\x1b[?1002h\x1b[?1006h`) to avoid
  crossterm's compound mode-set string (`?1000;1002;1006h`) which some
  terminal emulators fail to parse correctly.
- Add `RESET_SCROLL_REGION` (`\x1b[r`) to session teardown and panic
  cleanup, fixing inline-mode terminal corruption on unclean exit.

**ftui-tty/lib.rs — matching mouse escape fixes and ESC timeout:**
- Update `MOUSE_ENABLE` / `MOUSE_DISABLE` constants to use separate
  CSI sequences per mode (matching terminal_session.rs changes).
- Wire `parser.timeout()` into both the signal-based and poll-based
  event loops so bare ESC key and incomplete sequences are resolved
  when the read deadline expires.

**ftui-layout/pane.rs — margin/padding support and resize grip fix:**
- Add `margin` and `padding` fields to `PaneConstraints` with serde
  defaults, enabling per-pane spacing customization.
- Add `visual_rect_with_constraints()` to compute the visual pane
  rectangle accounting for custom margin and padding values.
- Fix `classify_resize_grip` to disambiguate overlapping edge zones on
  small panes by proximity (nearest edge wins), preventing a panic/None
  when both left+right or top+bottom zones overlap in panes < 3 cells.
- Add unit test `classify_resize_grip_handles_small_panes` covering
  1x1 and 2x1 edge cases.

**ftui-widgets/block.rs — padding support:**
- Add `padding: Sides` field to `Block` and `Block::padding()` builder.
- `Block::bordered()` now applies `Sides::all(1)` padding by default for
  consistent inner spacing.
- `Block::inner()` applies padding after border insets.
- `Block::chrome_size()` includes padding in its calculation.

**ftui-widgets/scrollbar.rs — thumb drag anchoring:**
- Add `drag_anchor: Option<usize>` to `ScrollbarState` to track where
  the user grabbed the thumb, preventing the thumb from jumping to the
  mouse cursor on initial click.
- Extract `calc_thumb_geometry()` helper to deduplicate thumb size/offset
  math between the renderer and the mouse handler.
- Separate `SCROLLBAR_PART_THUMB` (grab, no scroll) from
  `SCROLLBAR_PART_TRACK` (jump-to-position) in mouse-down handling.
- Drag events now map mouse position relative to the grab anchor,
  providing smooth proportional scrolling without jumps.
- Clear `drag_anchor` on mouse-up.

**ftui-widgets/virtualized.rs — visible_count and scrollbar delegation:**
- Change `VariableHeightsFenwick::visible_count` to include the first
  partially visible trailing item, fixing off-by-one where the last
  row would flash in/out of view during smooth scroll.
- Add `VirtualizedListState::handle_mouse()` that constructs a temporary
  `ScrollbarState`, delegates the event, and syncs position/anchor back.
- Add `scrollbar_drag_anchor` field to `VirtualizedListState` to persist
  the drag anchor across frames.

**ftui-widgets/sparkline.rs — alpha interpolation:**
- `Sparkline::lerp_color` now interpolates the alpha channel alongside
  RGB, fixing fully-transparent gradients when endpoints have differing
  alpha. Add test `lerp_color_interpolates_alpha`.

**ftui-widgets/textarea.rs — soft-wrap scroll fix:**
- Defer scroll-top adjustment to the soft-wrap rendering path when
  `soft_wrap` is enabled, preventing the cursor from jumping to the wrong
  visual line when the logical line count differs from the wrapped count.

**ftui-widgets/file_picker.rs — symlink traversal:**
- Follow symlinks via `std::fs::metadata()` (which resolves symlinks)
  when `DirEntry::file_type()` reports a symlink, so symlinked
  directories appear as navigable folders in the picker.

**ftui-widgets/tree.rs — allocation-free indent:**
- Replace `"    ".repeat(depth)` (which allocates a String per node)
  with an iterative `draw_text_span` loop, reducing allocations during
  tree rendering proportionally to tree depth.

**ftui-runtime/program.rs — task reaping and readability:**
- Replace drain+collect task-reaping loop with in-place `swap_remove`,
  eliminating a temporary Vec allocation per frame.
- Minor readability: bind `poll_event` result to a named variable and
  remove a stale comment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
